response:
1. total area of dining area = 20 * 15 = 300 m²  
area of zen garden = πr²  
area for dining tables = 300 - πr²  
given: 300 - πr² = 2πr²  
300 = 3πr²  
r² = 300 / (3π) = 100 / π  
r = √(100 / π) ≈ 5.64 m  

2. radius of fountain = r / 3 ≈ 5.64 / 3 ≈ 1.88 m  
surface area of cylinder (excluding base) = 2πrh = 2π * 1.88 * 1.5 ≈ 17.8 m²  
total cost = 17.8 * 50 = 890
